channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How Australia Can Adapt Homeownership Lessons from Overseas
item.description: Homeownership in Australia remains achievable for many, with about 62.7 per cent of households owning their home, slightly below the OECD average. However, the nature and cost of owning a home have sh...

item.title: Vice Ganda addresses concerns on parental responsibility on It’s Showtime
item.description: On the April 21, 2026 episode of It’s Showtime, Vice Ganda openly expressed frustration regarding the issue of irresponsible parenting in the Philippines. The comedian and TV host emphasized the impor...

item.title: Witness Testifies: Bong Revilla Identified as Proponent of P92.8-M Bulacan Flood Control Project on Instruction of Late DPWH Undersecretary
item.description: A witness from the Department of Public Works and Highways testified before the Sandiganbayan on Tuesday that the P92.8-million flood control project in Pandi, Bulacan was included in the 2025 General...

item.title: Malacañang confirms Carlito Galvez Jr. no longer heads OPAPRU
item.description: Kinumpirma ng Malacañang na may pagbabago sa pamumuno ng Office of the Presidential Adviser on Peace, Reconciliation and Unity (OPAPRU), kung saan hindi na si Secretary Carlito Galvez Jr. ang namumuno...

item.title: Liberals Promise Action on International Student Overstays Amid Integrity Issues
item.description: Canada's immigration officials have pledged action following a damning report by the Auditor General, which revealed that 153,000 cases of non-compliance in the international student program were flag...

item.title: 11-Year-Old Boy Allegedly Killed by Laundryman in Satna, Madhya Pradesh; Body Discovered in Drum at Home
item.description: In a shocking incident from Bank Colony under Kolgawan police station limits in Satna, Madhya Pradesh, an 11-year-old boy named Shivraj Rajak was found dead inside a blue drum at his home on 21 April ...

item.title: Alleged Chinese Surveillance Operation Targeted U.S. Figure Skater Alysa Liu and Her Father
item.description: The article details a complex alleged Chinese government-linked surveillance operation targeting Arthur Liu, a Chinese dissident living in the United States, and his daughter, Olympic figure skater Al...

item.title: Bodyguard of Sydney rapper abducted in violent late-night attack
item.description: The bodyguard of Sydney rapper Ay Huncho, Emilio Chalhoub, was abducted in a targeted attack at his Guildford home in the early hours of Monday morning. A group of masked men allegedly kidnapped Chalh...

item.title: Oloriegbe Defends Senate Record, Says APC Needs Strong Candidate for 2027 Kwara Governorship Race
item.description: Former senator Ibrahim Oloriegbe don declare say him get the experience and track record to contest for Kwara State governorship election for 2027 under the All Progressives Congress (APC). As e dey t...

item.title: Punjab Assembly rules revised agricultural income tax notifications unconstitutional, orders halt to collections
item.description: In a significant constitutional development, the Punjab Assembly has declared the government’s revised agricultural income tax notifications illegal, unconstitutional, and void from the beginning. The...

item.title: Nigeria pension returns begin align with inflation after years of decline
item.description: For the first time in about seven years, pension investment returns in Nigeria don begin catch up with inflation, bringing small relief to contributors wey don suffer steady loss in real value of thei...

item.title: Apple's CEO transition highlights importance of AI strategy
item.description: Apple is undergoing a major leadership change as Tim Cook hands over the reins to John Ternus, raising important questions about the company’s future strategy, particularly in artificial intelligence ...

item.title: Canadian tourist killed and several injured in shooting at Teotihuacán
item.description: A tragic incident occurred at the Teotihuacán archaeological site in Mexico, where a Canadian woman was killed and four others injured when a lone gunman opened fire from the Pyramid of the Moon. The ...

item.title: South Africans explore alcohol-free celebration at Sober Fest
item.description: Sober Fest, organised by Nomsa Mazwai, is challenging the traditional association of celebration with alcohol in South Africa. Held at the Soweto Theatre over Freedom Day weekend, this family-friendly...

item.title: Rupee slips slightly to 93.32 against U.S. dollar in early trade amid market factors
item.description: On Tuesday, April 21, 2026, the Indian rupee declined by 16 paise to trade at 93.32 against the U.S. dollar in early market hours. The depreciation comes as the American currency remains firm and the ...

item.title: Amnesty International urges police restraint ahead of nationwide fuel price protests in Kenya
item.description: Amnesty International Kenya has come out strongly calling on the National Police Service to exercise maximum restraint ahead of planned nationwide demonstrations over rising fuel prices scheduled for ...

item.title: Île Mercier Bridge in Montreal closed to vehicles amid spring flood warnings
item.description: The City of Montreal has temporarily closed the Île Mercier bridge to vehicle traffic as of 7 p.m. on Monday due to elevated flood risks caused by rising water levels on the Rivière des Prairies. Loca...

item.title: Akamba Community Seeks Legal Redress from UK for Colonial-Era Economic and Social Harm
item.description: Members of the Akamba community have officially lodged a lawsuit against the United Kingdom, aiming for compensation for injustices suffered during the colonial era. Augustus Kyalo Muli, who represent...

item.title: Young Sea Point chess prodigy Mason Stern claims national U12 title
item.description: Mason Jesse Stern, an 11-year-old chess player from Sea Point, has quickly established himself as one of South Africa’s most promising young talents. After winning the South African Junior Closed Ches...

item.title: ICMR initiates multi-state study to enhance palliative care services in India
item.description: The Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) is set to commence a multi-state implementation study aimed at broadening the reach of palliative care across India’s public health system. Currently, few...
